items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye Wharton amid Man United, Real Madrid interest
items.summary: Liverpool face competition from Manchester United and Real Madrid to sign Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Smriti Mandhana breaks Rohit Sharma’s record to become India’s leading run-scorer in T20Is
items.summary: In men's T20Is, the record belongs to Pakistan's Babar Azam, with 4,596 runs from 136 innings
